findings.problem: The narration repeatedly leans on clipped fragment emphasis: "Only that.", "Tight.", "Released.", "No apology. No explanation...", "No scene. No shouting...", and "Practical questions first. Feeling later...". At this frequency the device stops reading as pressure and starts reading as a house rhythm, and it conflicts with the constitution's ban on elliptical clipped narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the fragment-heavy beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:159, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:187, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:267, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:305, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:353, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:421 into grammatically complete close-third sentences that keep the pressure but carry an explicit subject and verb. Preserve urgency through cadence, image, or sentence length rather than repeated noun/adjective shards.
findings.acceptance_test: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:159, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:187, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:267, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:305, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:353, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:421, the revised narration reads as complete sentences with explicit subject-verb structure, and no more than one isolated narration fragment remains across those cited beats.

findings.problem: Four different pressure beats reuse the same '[laugh/word/words] came out ...' construction. That repetition flattens distinct emotional states that should land differently: Dre's brittle laugh, Micah's involuntary protest, his answer against the hood, and the public lie of "good."
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the speech-release beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:123, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:165, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:199, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:299 so each uses a different pressure mechanism. Let one stay acoustic if useful, but render the others through bodily resistance, social performance, or the physical environment instead of repeating the 'came out' template.
findings.acceptance_test: Across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:123, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:165, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:199, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:299, the revision contains no more than two instances of the '[laugh/word/words] came out ...' construction, and each beat reads as a distinct kind of pressure by syntax and image alone.

summary: The chapter clears the booker, craft, and dialogue bars: the stop is causal, unsanitized, and materially consequential; Micah, Dre, and Marcia stay voice-true to the style bible; contraction use and narrative tense stay consistent; and no continuity contradiction surfaced against the provided sheet. Prose is the failing lens because repeated clipped narration and repeated 'came out' sentence shapes turn otherwise sharp pressure beats into detectable tics.
